tests.title: the arXiv bundle makes every figure arXiv-acceptable; a non-convertible figure fails the export loudly with no tarball
errors: Error: arXiv bundle tarball never appeared at /tmp/pandoc-preview-proof-runs/20260620T002504Z/p125-arxiv-figure-gate/arxiv-figgate-bundle.tar.gz (result: {"success":false,"artifact":null,"exit_code":null,"stdout":"","stderr":"error: no plugin with id \"arxiv-export\" in the plugins dir"}). The generic plugin firewall did not discover/run the vendored arxiv-export plugin to produce a figure-gated bundle from the real buffer.
